architectural_notes: Admin panel access via shared URL redirects unauthorized users to main app instead of showing admin panel or login
known_issues: Sharing admin URL with another person shows them the main app instead of the admin panel

existing_features.title: When a user navigates to the admin page URL directly (e.g., via a shared link), they must be shown the admin panel (PIN auth guard) instead of being redirected to the main app or login page. The router must not intercept or redirect away from the /admin route for users who are not yet authenticated via Internet Identity — instead, the admin route should render the PINAuthGuard component which handles its own authentication flow independently of the main app auth.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin URL access control: when sharing admin panel URL with another person, they should be able to open the admin panel (not be redirected to the main app)
